title: Better Default 16x
description: A Simplistic Texturepack that Enhances the PvP Experience
body: Better Default is a modern Minecraft PvP texturepack that keeps the whole thing simplistic by only making the essential changes to PvP related things such as: - Short Slated Swords - Better Golden Apples - Small Utils - Cleaner Hotbar - Dark GUI - Colored Webs - Better Particles - Bow and Crossbow Charging Indicator - Clean Potions - Outlined Ores - Better Enchant Glint
